full_text:
Pang Yu (Ziyi) 龐淯 (子異)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Yu (龐淯), styledZiyi (子異), was born in Biaoshi county, Jiuquan commandery. Fillial man, helped avenge grandfather and tried to avenge master. Pang Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
